title: See more ... suddenly gone
excerpt: Hi I have an ticket I am working on with the Monday, team, but I wanted to see if anyone else has had this issue.   In the updates of a ticket we post sometimes rather lengthy updates. Suddenly from one hour to the next,…

posts.author: TanyaLubitz (Tanya Lubitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I have an ticket I am working on with the Monday, team, but I wanted to see if anyone else has had this issue. In the updates of a ticket we post sometimes rather lengthy updates. Suddenly from one hour to the next, my option of see more… on those lengthy response is gone, and the message is cut-off and I can no longer read the update. Quite useless.

Wonder if anyone else had this happen as support has not been able to assist yet.

Thanks
